libraryDescription: This library, system.Float, provides utility functions for the float type.

function0.name: toFloatArray
function0.description: Returns multiple float values together as an array.
function0.parameters: (...float[] type) args : The values to be collected into an array, as variable-length arguments.
function0.returnValue: (float[] type) The array containing the argument values.

function1.name: isFloat
function1.description: Determines whether the contents of the string can be converted to the float type.
function1.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function1.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.
